uplink.description: TER (0x04) datalog frame: 3 measurements (newest last) followed by a battery-percentage byte. Newest reading is at the top level; the two older readings are in history (newest-first), each with an RFC3339 time. Oldest record carries a negative temperature.
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder (vendor/mcf88/decoder-environmental.js parseTER) and mapped to the normalized vocabulary; pressure is atmospheric (hPa, within 900-1100)

uplink.description: TER (0x04) frame with a single measurement followed by a battery-percentage byte. No history is emitted.
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder (vendor/mcf88/decoder-environmental.js getTemperature/getHumidity/getPressure) and mapped to the normalized vocabulary

uplink.description: Unsupported frame id (0x09 metering) is rejected; this product only emits the TER (0x04) frame.
